sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96587" key="sterifopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερῐφο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n96587.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make firm</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
